query:
-- 查询所有批次的价格和CBM状态
SELECT 
  pv.id as variant_id,
  pv.productId,
  pv.variantName,
  pv.variantCode,
  pv.productLength,
  pv.productWidth,
  pv.productHeight,
  pv.cbm,
  pv.grossWeight,
  pv.netWeight,
  pv.isDefault,
  pv.supplierId,
  -- 检查是否有价格
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_variant_prices pvp WHERE pvp.variantId = pv.id) as price_count,
  -- 检查是否有材料
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM variant_materials vm WHERE vm.variantId = pv.id) as material_count
FROM product_variants pv
ORDER BY pv.productId, pv.id;
